181.reason: Missing 'break' statement after the '/' case, causing fall-through to default case

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  Missing 'break' statement after the '/' case, causing fall-through to default case
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  Missing 'break' statement after the '/' case, causing fall-through to default case
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Missing 'break;' statement after case '/': causes fall-through to default, incorrectly appending '/' again and generating invalid/duplicate tokens.

83.reason: Operator precedence: && binds tighter than ||, causing IndexOutOfBoundsException when last char is digit or line ends with identifier. Should be: while (pos < line.length() && (isIdent(line.charAt(pos)) || isDigit(line.charAt(pos))))

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Operator precedence: && binds tighter than ||, causing IndexOutOfBoundsException when last char is digit or line ends with identifier. Should be: while (pos < line.length() && (isIdent(line.charAt(pos)) || isDigit(line.charAt(pos))))
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  Operator precedence error: && has higher precedence than ||, causing isDigit() to be evaluated when pos >= line.length(), resulting in IndexOutOfBoundsException.

180.reason: Missing break statement; execution falls through to default case, causing the '/' to be processed again as a default token.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Missing break statement; execution falls through to default case, causing the '/' to be processed again as a default token.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  Missing 'break;' statement causes unintended fall-through to the default case

18.reason: Operator precedence: && binds tighter than ||, causing potential index out-of-bounds when pos >= length and isDigit is evaluated; should be `pos < line.length() && (isIdent(line.charAt(pos)) || isDigit(line.charAt(pos)))`.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Operator precedence: && binds tighter than ||, causing potential index out-of-bounds when pos >= length and isDigit is evaluated; should be `pos < line.length() && (isIdent(line.charAt(pos)) || isDigit(line.charAt(pos)))`.

170.reason: Missing `break` after the case '/': block; fall-through to default case causes further processing of the same character, leading to potential errors.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing `break` after the case '/': block; fall-through to default case causes further processing of the same character, leading to potential errors.
